title: Manage a moving sprinkler irrigation system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage a moving sprinkler irrigation system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Ensure the moving sprinkler irrigation system is prepared for operation

pcs.text: Assess staff training needs for carrying out pre-start checks and routine servicing and arrange training for those that require it
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess staff training needs for carrying out pre-start checks and routine servicing and arrange training for those that require it?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess staff training needs for carrying out pre-start checks and routine servicing and arrange training for those that require it.

pcs.text: Program or adjust the irrigation controller to meet the required schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Program or adjust the irrigation controller to meet the required schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Program or adjust the irrigation controller to meet the required schedule.

pcs.text: Develop pre-start procedures for adjusting valves and checking filters and emitters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop pre-start procedures for adjusting valves and checking filters and emitters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop pre-start procedures for adjusting valves and checking filters and emitters.
